full_text:
Liu Xiang 劉祥
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xiang (劉祥)was born in Lingling. Accompanied Sun Jian against Dong Zhuo. The people of Nanyang got revenge for their governors death at Sun Jian’s hands by killing Liu Xiang. Liu Xiang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wu Kingdom. Liu Xiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
